mapper.sql: id, group_id AS groupId, user_id AS userId, role, nick_name AS nickName, join_source AS joinSource, join_at AS joinAt, status, mute_until AS muteUntil, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY role ASC, id ASC

SELECT gm.user_id AS userId, u.user_no AS userNo, COALESCE(NULLIF(gm.nick_name, ''), u.nickname) AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, gm.role AS role, gm.status AS status, gm.mute_until AS muteUntil FROM im_group_member gm JOIN im_user u ON u.id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND gm.status = 1 ORDER BY gm.role ASC, gm.id ASC
SELECT user_id FROM im_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 1
